title: bitwarden: network errors in resolve/fetch mapped to Backend not Unavailable
description: resolve_project_id, resolve_secret_id, and the final secrets().get() in fetch() map all SecretsManagerError variants to Backend. SecretsManagerError::Api(ApiError::Reqwest(_)) and Api(ApiError::Io(_)) are network failures; Api(ApiError::ResponseContent { status }) with status.is_server_error() is a 5xx. These are transient — callers treating Backend as permanent will fail fast. Trigger: any network hiccup during project/secret resolution. Fix: add map_sm_error() helper that matches ApiError variants to select Unavailable vs Backend.
